setup_types.description: Entry on a retracement within an established trend.
Entry on a move through a defined resistance or consolidation level.
Fade an extended move back toward a statistical mean or VWAP.
Entry in direction of a confirmed longer-term trend, not a specific pattern.
Buy low / sell high within a clearly defined price range.
Setup predicated on a known catalyst: earnings, FDA, macro print, etc.
Entry into an accelerating move with short hold time.
Counter-trend entry against an overextended spike or squeeze.
Offsetting position to reduce exposure on an existing trade or portfolio.
Paper-only trade to test a hypothesis or system without capital at risk.

mistake_tags.description: Entered after the move had already extended past the planned entry.
Position was too large relative to the plan or risk limits.
Position was too small — missed meaningful participation in a valid trade.
Exited before the target or plan was fulfilled without a valid reason.
Stayed in a trade after thesis was invalidated or stop was obvious.
Entered without a defined stop, target, or thesis.
Stop was moved against the position to avoid a loss.
Stop was hit or clearly triggered but position was not exited.
Trade taken to recover from a prior loss rather than on merit.
Entered purely on fear of missing a move, without a valid setup.
Setup was valid on one timeframe but entry was misaligned with another.
Entered into a strong counter-trend macro or sector environment.
Held through earnings without accounting for binary event risk.
Mechanical error: wrong symbol, wrong side, wrong size.
Trade was closed but postmortem was not completed in a timely manner.
